alerts.reason: Obfuscated scripts hide malicious activity from security tools

alerts.malicious_activity: Keylogger recording keystrokes and sending data to remote server
alerts.reason: Input capture steals credentials and sensitive information

alerts.malicious_activity: Attempted to dump LSASS memory to extract user credentials
alerts.reason: Credential dumping allows attackers to move laterally across systems

alerts.malicious_activity: Mass file encryption with .wcry extension and shadow copy deletion
alerts.reason: Ransomware encrypts files to extort payment from victims

alerts.malicious_activity: WMI used to execute remote commands and maintain persistence
alerts.reason: WMI abuse allows stealthy remote execution without dropping files

alerts.malicious_activity: File hash matched 58/72 antivirus engines. Disguised as PDF invoice, drops payload to temp folder and contacts remote server
alerts.reason: Trojan disguises itself as legitimate file to trick users into running it

alerts.malicious_activity: Adware modifying browser extensions without consent and tracking browsing history
alerts.reason: Adware collects user data and displays unwanted advertisements

alerts.malicious_activity: Background process consuming 87% CPU connected to cryptocurrency mining pool
alerts.reason: Cryptominer uses victim resources to generate profit for attackers

alerts.malicious_activity: Crack tool attempting to disable Windows Defender and bundled with malware droppers
alerts.reason: Disabling security tools leaves system vulnerable to further infection

alerts.malicious_activity: Document contains auto-run macro matching suspicious rule signature
alerts.reason: Malicious macros execute automatically when document is opened
